task: Cool, can you move to it in this thread, and then make changes in it please? We need to add Qwen3.6-35b-a3b support on Alibaba Cloud - so it supports text, image, video input and text output, and the price is in the image, it also looks to support tools, and structured output so make sure these capabilites are enabled, it also looks to support temperature and top_p as well as max_tokens, seed, presence penalty, and response format, with tools, tool choice and structured outputs as mentioned - however this only seems to be on the OpenAI Chat Compatible API or the Dashscope API - so we might need to just see which one we use?
